creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 172995
path with update to 7.0.9

Attached a patch to update PHP to 7.0.9. 

Since i was involved in getting PHP 7 into the ports i would like to take the maintainer-ship if nobody else wants it.

Patch builds fine from 9.3 to current for i386 and amd64. Please test it by yourself.
